author: Soma Sekimoto
description: Merge duplicate highlights that Web Clipper appends when re-clipping a page, while protecting the comments you write under each quote. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Soma Sekimoto
manifest.description: Merge duplicate highlights that Web Clipper appends when re-clipping a page, while protecting the comments you write under each quote.
manifest.name: Clippings Dedupe

name: Clippings Dedupe

releases.author: somasekimoto
releases.description:
Initial release.

- Merge duplicate highlights appended by Obsidian Web Clipper on re-clip (vault-side answer to obsidian-clipper#180)
- The quoted text itself is the identity; the copy with a written comment always wins, two different comments are both kept
- Appended "(added ...)" sections are folded back into the main highlights section
- Notes are snapshotted into the plugin's backups/ folder before rewriting (oldest-first pruning, unrecognized files never touched)
- Persisted settings are type-validated; the watched folder is normalized and fails closed when unset
- Configurable folder, comment label, and headings; ships with English and Japanese Web Clipper templates
